title: Cobblemon Farmers
description: Put those mons to work! A Cobblemon addon adding different type of workstations for farming integration.
body:
# Cobblemon Farmers

Cobblemon Farmers is a side mode for Cobblemon that allows you to put your mons to work! Keep them busy with every day tasks around your base that vary depending on their type.

**This mod is heavily Work in Progress as it's being made for the upcoming Society: Sunlit Cobblemon. Expect bugs!**

# Features

## Pokémon workstations

Pokémon can be assigned to work at one of three workstation:

*   **Craft Station** - Crafts items depending on the type. Fire types cook ores and meat, steel types will double them
*   **Mystery Mine** - Digs for ores, archeology loot, and mob drops
*   **Ranching Station** - Enables ranching for mons! Milk your Miltanks or shear them for their drops!
*   **Gardening Station** - Waters farmland, grows crops, and farms experience from nearby Pokemon The type of job the Pokémon will do depends on their elemental type. 

## Worker Types reference
- **Fire** - *Craft Station* - Crafts all furnace recipes, smokes fish (**Sp. Attack**)
- **Fighting** -  *Craft Station* - Chops trees from Saplings  (**Attack (Time) + Sp. Def (Mult)**)
- **Steel** - *Craft Station* - Ore multiplying/limited recycling  (**Speed (Speed) + Attack (Mult)**)
- **Bug** - *Craft Station* - Crafts healing goods (**Defense**)
- **Ice** - *Craft Station* - Duplicates Crystals (**Sp. Attack**)
- **Ground** - *Mystery Mine* - Digs for archeology drops  (**Defense**)
- **Rock** - *Mystery Mine* - Mines for Overworld, Nether, and Skull Cavern ores  (**Attack (Time) + Sp. Attack (Mult)**)
- **Dragon** - *Mystery Mine* - Finds Gems and Golds (**Speed (Time) + HP (Mult)**)
- **Ghost** - *Mystery Mine* - Finds mob drops  (**Sp. Attack (Time) + Sp. Def (Mult)**)
- **Water** -  *Gardening Station* - Waters crops in an area (**Sp. Attack**)
- **Grass** - *Gardening Station* - Grows crops in an area (**Speed**)
- **Dark** - *Gardening Station* - Defeats Pokemon for experience (**HP**)
- **Normal** - *Gardening Station* - Ranches Pokemon (Forage + Milking) (**Speed**)
- **Fairy** - *Gardening Station* - Magic Shears Pokemon (**Sp. Attack**)
- **Not yet/fully implemented:** Flying, Psychic, poison, electric
  
## Stat-based efficiency

Each assignment has a stat that can influence the speed of working! In some cases, an additional stat can be set to influence another aspect of the job such as multiplying outputs.

## Worker Caps

Workers are powerful, especially ones leveled up! The amount of possible workers that can be assigned is determined by player attributes. This can be customized for modpack devs to better balance their packs.

# Dependencies

## Required

*   [Cobblemon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon)

## Optional

*   [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or equivalent for recipe viewing
*   [Sturdy Farmland - Growth Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/sturdy-farmland-growth-edition) - Gardening station support

## Support

Questions? Comments? Suggestions? Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/GdcZkrZqkj)!
